external_references.description: An, J and Malhotra, A. (2021, November 10). North Korean attackers use malicious blogs to deliver malware to high-profile South Korean targets. Retrieved December 29, 2021.
CISA, FBI, CNMF. (2020, October 27). https://us-cert.cisa.gov/ncas/alerts/aa20-301a. Retrieved November 4, 2020.
Varadharajan Krishnasamy, Aditya K Sood. (2025, July 29). From Reconnaissance  to Control: The Operational Blueprint of Kimsuky APT  for Cyber Espionage. Retrieved April 18, 2026.

objects.description: [Kimsuky](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0094) has staged collected data files under C:\Program Files\Common Files\System\Ole DB\.(Citation: CISA AA20-301A Kimsuky)(Citation: Talos Kimsuky Nov 2021) [Kimsuky](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0094) has also gathered data in structured directories prior to exfiltration under the %TEMP% environment variable.(Citation: Aryaka Kimsuky July 2025)
